steps.t: Food stores can be found throughout Upper Barnavon. Kai has asked you to collect food stores from the Ox-clan and distribute it among the Boar-clan.
Starving families can be found throughout Lower Barnavon. Kai asked you to distribute the food stores among the families of Lower Barnavon.
Kai is in Lower Barnavon. You should return to Kai and let him know that you have distributed the food as he had asked.
